setupTasks.name: Install ffmpeg + ffprobe
setupTasks.command: sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y ffmpeg && ffmpeg -version && ffprobe -version

setupTasks.name: Install Playwright browser
setupTasks.command: cd apps/api && python -m playwright install chromium --with-deps

setup:env.name: ⚙ Create .env files from .env.example
setup:env.command: [ -f apps/api/.env ] || cp apps/api/.env.example apps/api/.env; [ -f apps/web/.env.local ] || cp apps/web/.env.example apps/web/.env.local; echo 'Env files ready'
